headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

headline: Intel, Advanced Micro, And Texas Instruments Are Among Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (April 20-April 24): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: Large-cap stocks surged last week, driven by semiconductor strength and earnings-fueled optimism across sectors.
